message.content: why is renewed 625k locally but 527k in the commit?

content.text: I queried the SF source report 00OSq0000056ybJMAQ: it reads 625,365 realized [verified: analytics/reports factMap]. The 527K was a stale quarter-to-date figure [hypothesis: confirmed by Kyndryl close_date 2026-06-18 adding 101K]. No discrepancy between pipeline and Salesforce.
